body.title: Strip Control Station to pure breaker panel
body.result: dev tool cards removed; Master Kill + Soft Kill + per-device breaker table; note directs to Hubert feed (31fa58ed)
body.intention: I intend that Control Station is a single-purpose breaker panel — master kill, soft kill, per-device breakers — nothing else.
body.description:
Remove Goals, Decisions, Questions, Hypotheses, Outcomes, Palace Browser, Tools cards from Control Station. Add: master kill button (kills all devices), soft kill button (kills all except rack + web server), per-device circuit breaker row. GATE: T-hubert-wire-dev-tools must be closed first so the removed cards are already reachable from Hubert's fascia.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (ctrl-grid HTML, breaker endpoint stubs)
**Design rules:** log every breaker toggle at INFO
**Scope boundary:** UI restructure only. Breaker toggles can log to console if backend endpoint not yet wired — visual affordance is the deliverable here.
**Completion criteria:** Control Station shows only kill/soft-kill controls and per-device breaker row; no Goals/Decisions/etc cards present.
**Validation:** Open Control Station — only breakers visible. No dev tool cards.
**Observable via:** log.INFO('BREAKER_TOGGLE device={id} state={on|off}') when breaker clicked.
